message:
test(pthread): MR wait blocks in active states, fast-fails elsewhere (bd-nqoa)

Two condvar contract proptests:

prop_wait_blocks_from_active_states
  Wait and TimedWait from Idle or Waiting transition to Waiting with
  errno=0 and blocks=true.

prop_wait_fast_fails_from_inactive_states
  Wait and TimedWait from Uninitialized or Destroyed preserve the state,
  return EINVAL, and do NOT block — the waiter must not park against
  unusable condvar memory.

Orthogonal to prop_signal_broadcast_never_block: together they fence
the contract so no arm of the state machine can collapse the block/
no-block distinction across wakeup vs wait operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
